meta.description: A test case — a specific scenario with steps, expected outcome and pass/fail status

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_9549d28c_1067_44b9_b014_ec45806e76d9" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "preconditions" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "expected_result" TEXT,
    "actual_result" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    "priority" TEXT,
    "linked_ticket" TEXT,
    "automatable" BOOLEAN,
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_9549d28c_1067_44b9_b014_ec45806e76d9" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_9549d28c106744b9_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
